languages.text: "Мы отделались от братьев и сестер, ослепленных ложной верой в угасшую Пророчицу — и сразу сбросили оковы лицемерия и лжи. Старейшины погибшего города тщеславны и упрямы, их грехи не позволяют им видеть истины — Владыка Галактики даровал нам шанс приблизиться к его бессмертным телу и душе, и мы не в праве отвергать Его дар! Потому мы и стали сильнее. Во славу Алого Императора мы живем, убиваем и ведем заблудших к свету Его! Старейшины считают дар Его проклятием. Но они лгут сами себе — ведь мы не так уж и отличаемся друг от друга. Любое дитя, что захочет примкнуть к нашим рядам, приму я с распростертыми объятиями".

traits.locale_text: "Мы отделалились от братьев и сестер, ослепленных ложной верой в угасшую Пророчицу — и сразу сбросили оковы лицемерия и лжи. Старейшины погибшего города тщеславны и упрямы, их грехи не позволяют им видеть истины — Владыка Галактики даровал нам шанс приблизиться к его бессмертным телу и душе, и мы не в праве отвергать Его дар! Потому мы и стали сильнее. Во славу Алого Императора мы живем, убиваем и ведем заблудших к свету Его! Старейшины считают дар Его проклятием. Но они лгут сами себе — ведь мы не так уж и отличаемся друг от друга. Любое дитя, что захочет примкнуть к нашим рядам, приму я с распростертыми объятиями".

languages.text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their degeneracy making them blind to the blazing truth — the Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill, and we guide the lost toward the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."
languages.original_text: "Мы отделались от братьев и сестер, ослепленных ложной верой в угасшую Пророчицу — и сразу сбросили оковы лицемерия и лжи. traits.locale_text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their sins making them blind to the blazing truth — The Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill and we guide the lost towards the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."

languages.text: "Wir haben uns der Brüder und Schwestern entledigt, die durch den falschen Glauben an den ausgelöschten Propheten verblendet sind, und dabei die Fesseln der Lügen und der Heuchelei abgeworfen. Die Ältesten der toten Stadt sind stur und eitel, ihre Entartung macht sie blind für die glühende Wahrheit — der Herrscher der Galaxis hat uns die Möglichkeit gegeben, uns mit seinem Körper und seiner Seele zu verbinden, und wir haben kein Recht, sein göttliches Geschenk zurückzuweisen! Und so sind wir stark geworden. Wir leben, wir töten, und wir führen die Verlorenen zum Licht, zum Ruhme des Crimson Imperators! Die Ältesten betrachten seine Gabe als einen Fluch, aber sie täuschen sich, denn wir sind letztlich nicht anders. Ich werde jedes Kind, das sich uns anschließen will, in eine liebevolle Umarmung falten."
languages.original_text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their degeneracy making them blind to the blazing truth — the Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill, and we guide the lost toward the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."

Ich werde jedes Kind, das sich uns anschließen will, in eine liebevolle Umarmung falten."

languages.text: "Nous nous sommes débarrassés des frères et sœurs aveuglés par la fausse croyance en un Prophète éteint, et ce faisant, nous nous sommes débarrassés des chaînes du mensonge et de l'hypocrisie. Les anciens de la cité morte sont têtus et vaniteux, leur dégénérescence les rendant aveugles à la vérité éclatante — le Souverain de la Galaxie nous a donné la chance de nous lier à son corps et à son âme, et nous n'avons pas le droit de rejeter son don divin ! C'est ainsi que nous sommes devenus forts. Nous vivons, nous tuons et nous guidons les perdus vers la lumière pour la gloire de l'Empereur pourpre ! Les anciens considèrent son don comme une malédiction, mais ils se trompent eux-mêmes, car nous ne sommes pas différents en fin de compte. Je prendrai dans mes bras tout enfant qui cherchera à se joindre à nous."
languages.original_text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their degeneracy making them blind to the blazing truth — the Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill, and we guide the lost toward the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."

Je prendrai dans mes bras tout enfant qui cherchera à se joindre à nous."

languages.text: "Nos deshicimos de los hermanos y hermanas cegados por la falsa creencia en el Profeta extinguido, y al hacerlo nos deshicimos de las cadenas de la mentira y la hipocresía. Los ancianos de la ciudad muerta son obstinados y vanidosos, su degeneración les hace ciegos a la ardiente verdad: ¡el Soberano de la Galaxia nos ha dado la oportunidad de unirnos a Su cuerpo y a Su alma, y no tenemos derecho a rechazar Su don divino! Y así nos hemos hecho fuertes. Vivimos, matamos y guiamos a los perdidos hacia la luz para gloria del Emperador Carmesí. Los ancianos tratan Su don como una maldición, pero se engañan a sí mismos, pues al final no somos diferentes. Plegaré a cualquier niño que busque unirse a nosotros en un abrazo amoroso".
languages.original_text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their degeneracy making them blind to the blazing truth — the Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill, and we guide the lost toward the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."

languages.text: "Sönmüş Peygambere olan yanlış inancın kör ettiği kardeşlerimizden kurtulduk ve bunu yaparken yalan ve ikiyüzlülüğün prangalarını da attık. Ölü şehrin yaşlıları inatçı ve kibirlidir, yozlukları onları alev alev yanan gerçeğe karşı körleştirir — Galaksinin Hükümdarı bize O'nun bedeni ve ruhuyla bağ kurma şansı verdi ve O'nun ilahi armağanını reddetmeye hakkımız yok! Ve böylece güçlendik. Yaşıyoruz, öldürüyoruz ve Kızıl İmparator'un şanı için kayıpları ışığa doğru yönlendiriyoruz! Yaşlılar O'nun armağanını bir lanet olarak görüyorlar ama kendilerini kandırıyorlar, çünkü sonuçta bizim de bir farkımız yok. Bize katılmak isteyen her çocuğu sevgi dolu bir kucakla bağrıma basacağım."
languages.original_text: "We disposed of the brothers and sisters blinded by the false belief in the extinguished Prophet, and in doing so cast off the fetters of lies and hypocrisy. The elders of the dead city are stubborn and vain, their degeneracy making them blind to the blazing truth — the Sovereign of the Galaxy has given us the chance to bond with His body and His soul, and we have no right to reject His divine gift! An so we have grown strong. We live, we kill, and we guide the lost toward the light for the glory of Crimson Emperor! The elders treat His gift as a curse, but they deceive themselves, for we are no different in the end. I will fold any child who seeks to join us in a loving embrace."

Ve böylece güçlendik. Yaşıyoruz, öldürüyoruz ve Kızıl İmparator'un şanı için kayıpları ışığa doğru yönlendiriyoruz!
